title: Teltonika TSW114 Gigabit Din Rail Switch
description: Teltonika TSW114 is an affordable way to simplify your connectivity with its plug and play nature and 5 x Gigabit Ethernet ports that provide stable and reliable connectivity for high-bandwidth solutions. The switch has front-facing ports and an integrated DIN rail bracket to enable easy installation across many industrial environments - especially control cabinets Integrated DIN rail bracket and front-facing ports 5 x Gigabit Ethernet ports with speeds of up to 1000 Mbps Rugged anodized aluminum housing that fits in your pocket No additional configuration needed Device QSG (Quick Start Guide)
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power type DC connector Max. power consumption [W] 2,3 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Protection class IP30 Design DIN rail Fans No Chassis design Metal Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 174 Width [mm] 113 Height [mm] 28 Depth [mm] 81 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 10 MAC address table 2000 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9216
